requirements: R1: leads_to(tree, executed_by(tree, 'collect personal data', 'credit bureau service'), send_exist(tree, 'emailNotification'))
R2: leads_to(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'check credit worthiness')
R3: leads_to(tree, 'check credit worthiness', 'determine loan risk level')
R4: executed_by(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'credit broker') or executed_by(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'supervisor')
R6: executed_by(tree, 'check risks acceptable', 'branch office manager')
R13: by_due_date(tree, 'sign loan contract', '7 working days', 'close loan contract offer')
R14: condition_eventually_follows(tree, 'loanRequestCredit > 1000000', executed_by(tree, 'check credit worthiness', 'clerk supervisor'))
R15: condition_eventually_follows(tree, '(loanRequestCredit > 1000000) and (supervisorCheckMissing == true)', 'create suspense file')
